technology.title: ‘Potential security risk’: Unpacking the UK’s trust issues with Palantir
technology.summary: Analysts say it is challenging to track whether Palantir is sticking to the terms of its NHS contract.

briefing.news_focus: Analysts say it is challenging to track whether Palantir is sticking to the terms of its NHS contract.
briefing.news_focus_zh: 英國對Palantir的信任問題引發關注，分析師指出，追蹤該公司是否遵循其與國民健康服務（NHS）簽訂的合約條款相當具挑戰性。這一情況引發了對Palantir在數據安全和隱私方面的潛在風險的討論。
briefing.background: Palantir是一家專注於數據分析的科技公司，近年來與多個政府機構合作，包括英國的NHS。隨著數據隱私和安全問題日益受到重視，Palantir的合約執行狀況成為焦點。英國政府對於數據使用的透明度和合規性有著嚴格的要求，這使得Palantir的運作受到密切監視。特別是在公共健康領域，數據的準確性和安全性對於政策制定和民眾信任至關重要。
briefing.analysis: 英國政府對Palantir的信任問題反映了對數據安全的高度關注。分析師指出，Palantir在合約執行上的透明度不足，可能導致對其數據處理方式的質疑。這一情況可能影響Palantir在英國的業務發展，尤其是在公共部門的合作機會。此外，隨著數據隱私法規的日益嚴格，Palantir需加強合規性以維護其市場地位。不同於其他科技公司，Palantir的業務模式依賴於與政府機構的合作，這使其面臨更高的監管風險和公眾 scrutiny。

technology.title: OpenAI just released its answer to Claude Mythos
technology.summary: OpenAI is launching Daybreak, an AI initiative focused on detecting and patching vulnerabilities before attackers find them. Daybreak uses the Codex Security AI agent that launched in March to create a threat model based on an organization's code and focus on possible attack paths, validate likely vulnerabilities, and then automate the detection of the higher […]

briefing.news_focus: OpenAI is launching Daybreak, an AI initiative focused on detecting and patching vulnerabilities before attackers find them. Daybreak uses the Codex Security AI agent that launched in March to create a threat model based on an organization's code and focus on possible attack paths, validate likely vulnerabilities, and then automate the detection of the higher […]
briefing.news_focus_zh: OpenAI推出了一項名為Daybreak的AI計畫，旨在在攻擊者發現漏洞之前，檢測並修補這些漏洞。Daybreak利用在三月推出的Codex Security AI代理，根據組織的代碼建立威脅模型，專注於可能的攻擊路徑，驗證潛在的漏洞，並自動化檢測高風險的安全問題。
briefing.background: 隨著數位化進程的加速，企業面臨的網絡安全威脅日益增加。許多組織在應對安全漏洞時，往往是事後補救，這使得他們容易受到攻擊。OpenAI的Daybreak計畫正是針對這一需求而設計，通過預防性措施來加強安全防護。Codex Security AI代理的推出，標誌著OpenAI在安全領域的進一步擴展，並顯示出其對於AI技術在網絡安全應用上的重視。
briefing.analysis: OpenAI推出Daybreak的舉措反映了當前市場對於主動防禦網絡安全的需求。隨著攻擊手法的日益複雜，企業越來越需要能夠預測和防範潛在威脅的解決方案。Daybreak的成功將取決於其能否有效識別並修補漏洞，並在業界建立信任。此外，這一計畫可能會引發其他科技公司進一步競爭，推動更多創新解決方案的出現。雖然目前沒有其他報導提供補充細節，但未來可能會有其他企業針對類似問題提出不同的技術或策略，進一步擴大市場競爭。

technology.title: Daniel Ek-backed defense tech Helsing to raise $1.2B at $18B valuation
technology.summary: Five-year old European military drone startup Helsing is close to raising another monster round.

briefing.news_focus: Five-year old European military drone startup Helsing is close to raising another monster round.
briefing.news_focus_zh: 歐洲軍事無人機初創公司Helsing正在接近完成一輪12億美元的融資，估值達到180億美元。這家公司成立僅五年，受到Spotify創始人Daniel Ek的支持，顯示出其在防務科技領域的潛力和吸引力。
briefing.background: Helsing成立於2018年，專注於開發先進的軍事無人機技術，這一領域在近年來因地緣政治緊張和軍事需求上升而受到高度關注。隨著各國對無人機技術的需求增加，Helsing的市場潛力也隨之擴大。特別是在歐洲，隨著防務開支的增加，許多國家正在尋求提升其軍事能力，這為Helsing的成長提供了良好的環境。
briefing.analysis: Helsing的成功融資反映出投資者對軍事科技的高度興趣，尤其是在當前全球安全形勢不穩定的背景下。Daniel Ek的支持不僅為Helsing提供了資金，還可能帶來其在科技領域的專業知識和網絡。未來，Helsing可能會面臨來自其他軍事科技公司的競爭，這些公司也在努力開發創新技術以滿足市場需求。此外，隨著資金的增加，Helsing可能會加速其產品開發和市場擴張，進一步鞏固其在防務科技領域的地位。

politics.title: EU agrees sanctions on West Bank settlers and Hamas leaders
politics.summary: The group declined to support stronger measures from some European governments and withheld details, but French Foreign Minister Jean-Noël Barrot said the Ministers had decided to sanction Hamas leaders

briefing.news_focus: The group declined to support stronger measures from some European governments and withheld details, but French Foreign Minister Jean-Noël Barrot said the Ministers had decided to sanction Hamas leaders
briefing.news_focus_zh: 歐盟決定對西岸定居者和哈馬斯領導人實施制裁。儘管一些歐洲國家提議更強硬的措施，但最終未獲得支持。法國外交部長讓-諾埃爾·巴羅表示，外長們已決定對哈馬斯領導人進行制裁。
briefing.background: 近期以色列與哈馬斯之間的衝突加劇，導致西岸地區的暴力事件頻發，這引發了國際社會的關注。歐盟作為一個重要的政治與經濟聯盟，對於中東和平進程的關注持續升溫。歐盟外長在此次會議中強調，極端主義和暴力行為必須承擔後果，這一立場反映了對於以色列和巴勒斯坦局勢的深刻擔憂。
briefing.analysis: 此次制裁決定顯示出歐盟對於以色列定居者在西岸地區的行為以及哈馬斯的立場的強烈反對。參考報導中提到，歐盟外長強調了極端主義和暴力的後果，而以色列則對此舉表示譴責，稱其為“任意”的行為。這表明歐盟在面對以色列的壓力時，仍然試圖維持對巴勒斯坦人權益的支持。未來，這一制裁可能會影響以色列與歐盟之間的外交關係，並引發其他國家對於類似行為的反應。

supporting_titles: EU agrees sanctions on Israeli settlers over West Bank violence
Taiwan ‘confident’ in US ties, foreign minister says
supporting_summaries: The EU's foreign policy chief said "extremism and violence carry consequences", while Israel branded the move "arbitrary".

politics.title: US climber dies in avalanche on Nepal’s Mount Makalu
politics.summary: An American climber has died in an avalanche on Mount Makalu, officials said on Tuesday, as fatalities mount early in Nepal’s busy spring climbing season. Shelley Johannesen, 53, was killed on Monday while descending from the summit of the world’s fifth-highest peak, expedition organisers said, marking the season’s latest death. David Roubinek, a 38-year-old Czech climber, and three Nepali guides have died in the Himalayas so far this season. Johannesen, co-founder of US-based outfitter Dash...

briefing.news_focus: An American climber has died in an avalanche on Mount Makalu, officials said on Tuesday, as fatalities mount early in Nepal’s busy spring climbing season. Shelley Johannesen, 53, was killed on Monday while descending from the summit of the world’s fifth-highest peak, expedition organisers said, marking the season’s latest death. David Roubinek, a 38-year-old Czech climber, and three Nepali guides have died in the Himalayas so far this season. Johannesen, co-founder of US-based outfitter Dash...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 美國登山者雪莉·約翰內森（Shelley Johannesen）在尼泊爾的馬卡魯峰（Mount Makalu）遭遇雪崩，於周一不幸遇難。這起事件發生在尼泊爾繁忙的春季登山季節初期，隨著登山活動增加，死亡人數也在上升。除了約翰內森外，已有捷克登山者大衛·魯比內克（David Roubinek）及三名尼泊爾向導在本季登山中喪生。
briefing.background: 馬卡魯峰是全球第五高的山峰，吸引了眾多登山者前來挑戰。每年春季，尼泊爾的登山季節都會吸引來自世界各地的登山愛好者，然而，隨著登山活動的增加，事故和死亡事件也時有發生。尼泊爾的登山業對當地經濟至關重要，但安全問題始終是登山活動中的一大挑戰，尤其是在惡劣天氣和雪崩風險較高的情況下。
briefing.analysis: 此次雪崩事件突顯了登山活動中的安全隱患，尤其是在春季登山季節中，隨著越來越多的登山者進入高危險區域，事故風險也隨之增加。各方對於登山安全的關注度提升，可能促使尼泊爾政府和相關機構加強對登山活動的監管和安全措施。登山業者與當地向導的角色也將受到檢視，如何平衡商業利益與登山者的安全將成為未來討論的焦點。此外，隨著死亡人數的上升，可能會引發對於登山許可和安全標準的重新評估。

politics.title: France’s Macron announces $27bn investment in Africa at Kenya summit
politics.summary: Africa Forward summit comes amid France's fading ties with its former African colonies, as Kenya seeks greater trade.

briefing.news_focus: Africa Forward summit comes amid France's fading ties with its former African colonies, as Kenya seeks greater trade.
briefing.news_focus_zh: 法國總統馬克宏在肯尼亞舉行的非洲前進峰會上宣布將對非洲投資270億美元，旨在重振法國與其前非洲殖民地的關係，並促進貿易。此次峰會的背景是法國與非洲的關係逐漸淡化，肯尼亞則希望加強貿易往來。
briefing.background: 法國在非洲的影響力正面臨挑戰，尤其是在其前殖民地國家中。隨著中國和其他國家在非洲的投資增加，法國需要重新評估其在該地區的外交和經濟策略。肯尼亞作為東非的重要國家，正試圖擴大與外國的貿易關係，並尋求更多的外資來支持其經濟發展。在這樣的背景下，馬克宏的270億美元投資計畫被視為法國重建與非洲關係的重要一步。
briefing.analysis: 馬克宏在峰會上宣布的投資計畫反映了法國對於重振與非洲關係的迫切需求，尤其是在面對中國和其他國家的競爭時。然而，根據參考報導，馬克宏在峰會上對與會者的批評，指出他們的行為缺乏尊重，顯示出他在推動法國利益時的強硬立場。這可能會引發與非洲國家之間的緊張關係，尤其是在他們對法國的期望與實際行動之間存在差距的情況下。各方利益關係的角力將影響未來的投資效果及法國在非洲的長期影響力。

supporting_titles: Macron takes the stage uninvited at Africa summit to scold crowd for 'total lack of respect'
supporting_summaries: French President Emmanuel Macron interrupted a youth-focused session at the Africa Forward Summit in Nairobi, calling the disruption "a total lack of respect."

economy.title: UK borrowing costs hit highest since 1998 amid Starmer uncertainty
economy.summary: Bond yields soar and pound falls against dollar as investors brace for potential Labour leadership change Business live – latest updates UK politics live – latest updates Long-term UK borrowing costs have soared to the highest level in nearly three decades while the pound and stocks fell as investors braced for a potential change of leadership, with cabinet ministers urging Keir Starmer to quit . With investors worried about potential changes to the fiscal rigour of Starmer’s government, the yield – in effect the interest rate – on 30-year government bonds jumped 11 basis points to 5.794%, the highest since May 1998. Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: Bond yields soar and pound falls against dollar as investors brace for potential Labour leadership change Business live – latest updates UK politics live – latest updates Long-term UK borrowing costs have soared to the highest level in nearly three decades while the pound and stocks fell as investors braced for a potential change of leadership, with cabinet ministers urging Keir Starmer to quit . With investors worried about potential changes to the fiscal rigour of Starmer’s government, the yield – in effect the interest rate – on 30-year government bonds jumped 11 basis points to 5.794%, the highest since May 1998. Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 英國長期借貸成本達到近三十年來的最高水平，這一情況發生在投資者對工黨領導人基爾·斯塔默（Keir Starmer）可能下台的擔憂中。隨著內閣成員呼籲斯塔默辭職，30年期國債收益率上升了11個基點，達到5.794%，是自1998年以來的最高點。同時，英鎊對美元匯率下跌，股市也出現下滑。
briefing.background: 近期，英國政治局勢不穩定，工黨內部對領導層的質疑加劇，這使得市場對未來政策的預期變得不確定。斯塔默的政府在財政紀律方面的立場受到挑戰，投資者擔心如果發生領導變更，可能會導致財政策略的重大調整。這種不確定性直接影響了國債收益率的上升，反映出市場對政府未來財政策的擔憂。
briefing.analysis: 目前，英國的借貸成本上升反映了市場對政治不穩定的敏感反應。投資者對斯塔默的財政策略感到不安，特別是在內閣成員呼籲其辭職的背景下，這進一步加劇了市場的不安情緒。若斯塔默下台，可能會導致新領導人採取不同的經濟政策，這將影響投資者的信心和市場走向。此外，英鎊的貶值和股市的下滑也顯示出市場對未來經濟環境的擔憂。這一情況可能會促使政府在政策上做出調整，以穩定市場情緒。

economy.title: Tax cuts and cost of living help proposed by Labour-linked groups allied to Streeting and Burnham
economy.summary: With Starmer under growing pressure to resign, Growth and Tribune groups put forward ideas for policy revamps UK politics live – latest updates Groups connected to the health secretary, Wes Streeting, and the Greater Manchester mayor, Andy Burnham, have proposed large changes to government policy, giving a sense of how the country may change should either one succeed Keir Starmer. The Labour Growth Group, allied to Streeting, and the Tribune group of Labour MPs, allied to Burnham, have published competing visions for how Britain should be run, including sweeping tax cuts, help with the cost of living and big changes to government machinery. Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: With Starmer under growing pressure to resign, Growth and Tribune groups put forward ideas for policy revamps UK politics live – latest updates Groups connected to the health secretary, Wes Streeting, and the Greater Manchester mayor, Andy Burnham, have proposed large changes to government policy, giving a sense of how the country may change should either one succeed Keir Starmer. The Labour Growth Group, allied to Streeting, and the Tribune group of Labour MPs, allied to Burnham, have published competing visions for how Britain should be run, including sweeping tax cuts, help with the cost of living and big changes to government machinery. Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 英國工黨內部的兩個團體，分別是與衛生大臣Wes Streeting相關的成長小組和與大曼徹斯特市長Andy Burnham相關的Tribune小組，提出了對政府政策的大幅改變建議，這反映出若Streeting或Burnham接替Keir Starmer，英國可能會發生的變化。這些提案包括大規模的減稅、生活成本援助以及政府機構的重大改革，顯示出工黨內部對未來政策的不同願景。
briefing.background: 目前，英國工黨面臨內部壓力，尤其是對黨魁Keir Starmer的領導能力的質疑。隨著生活成本上升和經濟挑戰，工黨內部的不同派系開始提出各自的政策建議，以吸引選民支持。成長小組主張通過減稅來刺激經濟，而Tribune小組則強調社會福利和生活成本援助的重要性。這些提案不僅反映了當前的經濟環境，也顯示出工黨內部對未來方向的不同看法。
briefing.analysis: 在這一背景下，Streeting和Burnham的提案代表了工黨內部的不同利益和策略。Streeting的成長小組主張減稅，可能吸引中產階級選民，意圖在經濟復甦中獲得支持；而Burnham的Tribune小組則更關注社會福利，可能會吸引低收入選民和工會的支持。這種內部競爭可能會導致工黨在未來的選舉中出現分歧，影響其整體競選策略。參考報導《經濟學人》提到的對於財富稅的討論，雖未直接提及這兩個小組，但反映出對於稅收政策的不同看法，可能會成為未來政策辯論的焦點。

supporting_summaries: Even the most sophisticated arguments in favour of doing so make no sense

economy.title: Buyers of Liza Minnelli memoir claim it was not signed by hand
economy.summary: Premium editions of Kids, Wait Till You Hear This! cost up to $250 but some say signatures are unnaturally identical Liza Minnelli fans who bought signed copies of her memoir are seeking refunds because they believe her signature is fake. Copies of Kids, Wait Till You Hear This ! by the American 80-year-old singer were marketed around the world as “hand-signed collectibles”, with premium editions costing up to $250 (£185). Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: Premium editions of Kids, Wait Till You Hear This! cost up to $250 but some say signatures are unnaturally identical Liza Minnelli fans who bought signed copies of her memoir are seeking refunds because they believe her signature is fake. Copies of Kids, Wait Till You Hear This ! by the American 80-year-old singer were marketed around the world as “hand-signed collectibles”, with premium editions costing up to $250 (£185). Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: Liza Minnelli的回憶錄《Kids, Wait Till You Hear This!》的買家對於其所謂的手寫簽名提出質疑，認為簽名並非由Minnelli本人親自簽署。這些簽名版的收藏品在全球市場上以高達250美元的價格銷售，然而，買家們發現簽名之間的相似度過高，因而要求退款。
briefing.background: Liza Minnelli是一位知名的美國歌手和演員，其回憶錄的發行吸引了眾多粉絲的關注。這本書的高價位和被標示為“手簽收藏品”的特性，使得其市場需求上升。然而，隨著消費者對於簽名真偽的質疑，這一市場的信任度受到挑戰。手簽商品在收藏市場中通常具有較高的價值，消費者對於其真實性有著極高的期待，這也使得一旦出現質疑，可能引發大規模的退款潮。
briefing.analysis: 目前，買家對於簽名的真實性表示懷疑，這可能會對Liza Minnelli的品牌形象造成負面影響。若這些簽名被證實為偽造，將不僅影響到本書的銷售，還可能對未來的簽名商品市場造成衝擊。此事件也突顯了在高價商品中，消費者對於真實性和稀有性的重視。雖然目前尚未有官方回應，但若未來有進一步的調查或證據出現，可能會導致法律行動或更廣泛的市場反應，進一步影響相關的出版商和經銷商的信譽。
